source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A cord passing over a frictionless pulley has a 9 kg mass tied on one end and a 7 kg mass on the other end (Fig. 1.2). Determine the acceleration of the cord.

candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A cord passing over a frictionless pulley has a 9 kg mass tied on one end and a 7 kg mass on the other end (Fig. 1.2). Determine the acceleration of the cord.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL object string representation rather than a file path or URL
question references Fig. 1.2, but record indicates vision_relevance is optional
metadata.reasoning_chain: Neglecting the moment of inertia of the pulley, we obtain the equations of motion $m_{1} \ddot{x}=m_{1} g-F$ and $m_{2} \ddot{x}=F-m_{2} g$. Hence the acceleration is $$\begin{aligned}\ddot{x}&=\frac{(m_{1}-m_{2})g}{m_{1}+m_{2}}=\frac{2g}{16}\\&=1.225 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2}\end{aligned}$$
